title: 把 construction (bǎ)
explanation: The 把 construction moves the object before the verb to emphasize what happens to it. The verb usually needs a complement or other element after it.

examples.chinese: 请把门关上。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng bǎ mén guān shàng.
examples.english: Please close the door.

examples.chinese: 他把作业做完了。
examples.pinyin: Tā bǎ zuòyè zuò wán le.
examples.english: He finished the homework.

title: Passive with 被 (bèi)
explanation: 被 (bèi) marks the passive voice. The subject receives the action. Often used for unpleasant or unexpected events.

examples.chinese: 我的手机被偷了。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ de shǒujī bèi tōu le.
examples.english: My phone was stolen.

examples.chinese: 蛋糕被弟弟吃了。
examples.pinyin: Dàngāo bèi dìdi chī le.
examples.english: The cake was eaten by my younger brother.

title: More and more with 越来越 (yuèláiyuè)
explanation: 越来越 expresses that something is becoming more and more of a quality over time.

examples.chinese: 天气越来越冷了。
examples.pinyin: Tiānqì yuèláiyuè lěng le.
examples.english: The weather is getting colder and colder.

examples.chinese: 他的中文越来越好。
examples.pinyin: Tā de Zhōngwén yuèláiyuè hǎo.
examples.english: His Chinese is getting better and better.

title: 除了...以外 (chúle...yǐwài) - Besides/Except
structure: 除了 + A + 以外，(都/也) + ...
explanation: 除了...以外 means "besides" (with 也/还) or "except" (with 都). It sets apart one item from the rest.

examples.chinese: 除了中文以外，我也学日语。
examples.pinyin: Chúle Zhōngwén yǐwài, wǒ yě xué Rìyǔ.
examples.english: Besides Chinese, I also study Japanese.

examples.chinese: 除了他以外，大家都来了。
examples.pinyin: Chúle tā yǐwài, dàjiā dōu lái le.
examples.english: Except for him, everyone came.

title: 不但...而且 (búdàn...érqiě) - Not only...but also
explanation: 不但...而且 is used to add information, meaning "not only A, but also B."

examples.chinese: 她不但聪明，而且很努力。
examples.pinyin: Tā búdàn cōngmíng, érqiě hěn nǔlì.
examples.english: She is not only smart, but also very hardworking.

examples.chinese: 这个菜不但好吃，而且便宜。
examples.pinyin: Zhège cài búdàn hǎochī, érqiě piányi.
examples.english: This dish is not only delicious, but also cheap.

title: 虽然...但是 (suīrán...dànshì) - Although...but
explanation: 虽然...但是 means "although A, but B." Unlike English, Chinese uses both "although" and "but" together.

examples.chinese: 虽然很累，但是我很开心。
examples.pinyin: Suīrán hěn lèi, dànshì wǒ hěn kāixīn.
examples.english: Although I'm tired, I'm very happy.

examples.chinese: 虽然下雨了，但是我们还是去了。
examples.pinyin: Suīrán xià yǔ le, dànshì wǒmen háishi qù le.
examples.english: Although it rained, we still went.

title: 如果...就 (rúguǒ...jiù) - If...then
explanation: 如果...就 expresses a conditional relationship: "if A, then B."

examples.chinese: 如果明天下雨，我们就不去了。
examples.pinyin: Rúguǒ míngtiān xià yǔ, wǒmen jiù bú qù le.
examples.english: If it rains tomorrow, we won't go.

examples.chinese: 如果你有问题，就问老师。
examples.pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ yǒu wèntí, jiù wèn lǎoshī.
examples.english: If you have questions, ask the teacher.

title: 一边...一边 (yìbiān...yìbiān) - While doing...also doing
structure: Subject + 一边 + V1 + 一边 + V2
explanation: 一边...一边 indicates two actions happening simultaneously.

examples.chinese: 他一边吃饭一边看电视。
examples.pinyin: Tā yìbiān chī fàn yìbiān kàn diànshì.
examples.english: He eats while watching TV.

examples.chinese: 她一边走一边听音乐。
examples.pinyin: Tā yìbiān zǒu yìbiān tīng yīnyuè.
examples.english: She listens to music while walking.

title: 对...来说 (duì...lái shuō) - For/To someone
explanation: 对...来说 means "for someone" or "as far as someone is concerned."

examples.chinese: 对我来说，学中文很有意思。
examples.pinyin: Duì wǒ lái shuō, xué Zhōngwén hěn yǒu yìsi.
examples.english: For me, learning Chinese is very interesting.

examples.chinese: 对外国人来说，汉字很难。
examples.pinyin: Duì wàiguó rén lái shuō, hànzì hěn nán.
examples.english: For foreigners, Chinese characters are very difficult.

title: 连...都/也 (lián...dōu/yě) - Even
explanation: 连...都/也 emphasizes something surprising or extreme, meaning "even."

examples.chinese: 他连自己的名字都不会写。
examples.pinyin: Tā lián zìjǐ de míngzì dōu bú huì xiě.
examples.english: He can't even write his own name.

examples.chinese: 我忙得连饭都没吃。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ máng de lián fàn dōu méi chī.
examples.english: I was so busy that I didn't even eat.
